notable_descendants.name: King of Shu
notable_descendants.status: Still exists, pays tribute to Han

notable_descendants.name: Huo Guang
notable_descendants.title: Great General of Han
notable_descendants.ancestor: Uncle Chu, enfeoffed at Huo by King Wu of Zhou

principle: The Yellow Emperor received the mandate of heaven to rule; his virtue benefited later generations, so his descendants became emperors - heaven's reward for virtue
